category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a vector graphics language; official Asymptote FAQ describes it as a vector graphics language for technical graphics.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use Asymptote; source_facts.name is asymptote.
docs_sources: Official Asymptote site has dedicated Documentation and FAQ sections linked from its menu.
repo_sources: Official Asymptote GitHub repository README points to asymptote.sourceforge.io for installation, documentation, binaries, and source code; official site menu includes Download/Git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official FAQ identify a TeX-aware vector graphics language for technical graphics; source_facts.executables lists asy and xasy.
